title: Install Docker Engine
description: This legacy app server needs Docker for a migration pilot. SSH in and install the Docker engine package, then confirm the service is available.

workstation.reason: Use a terminal workstation to SSH in, or Ubuntu Desktop if you prefer a graphical environment while following install docs.

objectivesPublic.label: SSH into the lab
objectivesPublic.hint: Use the lab credentials panel with your workstation terminal.

objectivesPublic.label: Install Docker engine
objectivesPublic.text: Install the distribution Docker engine package and confirm the CLI works.
objectivesPublic.hint: On Debian/Ubuntu the engine package is often named docker.io — apt install, then run a version command.
